opportunities.label: Online Scheduling Automation
opportunities.signal: Phone-only contact with no booking tools detected on site or GMB.
opportunities.observation: Boise HVAC customers searching after hours are booking competitors instead.
opportunities.fix: Deploy AI scheduling widget capturing leads 24/7 without requiring a phone call.

opportunities.label: Maintenance Reminder Automation
opportunities.signal: No email marketing tools detected and no recurring revenue signals on site.
opportunities.observation: Existing customers in Boise are not being prompted for seasonal HVAC tune-ups.
opportunities.fix: Automate spring cooling and fall heating reminder campaigns to past customer list.

opportunities.label: Call Capture CRM
opportunities.signal: No CRM or marketing tools detected and phone-only contact model confirmed.
opportunities.observation: Every unbooked inbound call leaves no record, losing Boise leads permanently.
opportunities.fix: Implement AI call capture that logs caller info and intent directly into a CRM.
